3164740.name: Cold Boot Attack!
3164740.description:
Meadow Island was once a picturesque fishing town. Now, it's quietly transforming into a business park for the sprawling city next door.

But something’s off. Why are corporations, security agencies—and criminals—so invested in this fading seaside town?

As you dive into the island’s underground scene, you’ll form alliances with hackers, forgers, radio pirates, and graffiti artists. 

Your new gig as a security tester doesn’t just pay you to break into buildings—it gives you the perfect cover to uncover the town’s deepest secrets.

  • Simulated Phone System

  • Simulated Networks

  • Simulated Computers including boot disks and services
